$schema_note: Template only — NOT real extracted data. Each instance of this template is filled by a HUMAN REVIEWER for one menu file in the golden dataset. Do NOT auto-generate from extractor output. Versioned by (dataset_id, dataset_version).
template_purpose: Golden expected output per menu file. Source of truth for extraction evaluation.

classification: <one or more of: SIMPLE_MENU | MEDIUM_MENU | COMPLEX_MENU | VARIANT_MENU | ADDON_MENU | PDF_TEXT_MENU | PDF_SCANNED_MENU | IMAGE_CLEAR_MENU | IMAGE_POOR_QUALITY_MENU | TAX_NOTE_MENU | REGIONAL_INDIAN_MENU | EDGE_CASE_MENU>
set_membership: <one or more of: SMOKE | PHASE1_GOLDEN | STRESS | LEARNING_MEMORY | PHASE2_PARKING>
instance_metadata.third_reviewer_resolver: <string | null — only if first two disagreed>
instance_metadata.frozen_at: <ISO-8601 datetime | null — once non-null, this expected output is immutable for this dataset_version>

expected_rows.category: <string — canonical category name as the reviewer would expect>
expected_rows.raw_text_reference: <string — the literal source text on the page that grounds this row>

source_bbox_hint.comment: Optional. Reviewer may provide approximate bbox if helpful; not required.

expected_warnings: <zero or more of: price_uncertain | category_inferred | variant_detected | possible_addon_detected | addon_without_parent_item | multi_column_confusion | duplicate_possible | same_name_different_price | same_price_different_variant | missing_price | possible_spelling_issue | tax_note_detected | combo_detected | unit_price_detected | no_source_grounding>

phase2_only_detail.comment: If this row's variants/add-ons are NOT required to be extracted in Phase 1, populate this block. Phase 1 must still flag the pattern.

expected_menu_notes.note_type: <one of: tax_note | service_charge_note | packaging_note | addon_note | availability_note | general_note>
expected_menu_notes.expected_mapping: <one of: unmapped | addon | modifier | tax_setting | item_description | ignored>

expected_aggregate_counts.comment: Aggregate ground truth used for row-count + recall metrics.

rules_for_reviewer: Do NOT invent any row. Every expected row must be visible in the source file.
Use exact spelling expected AFTER normalization (title-case, currency stripped).
When unsure about category, use the category text from the menu itself; if no category visible, mark expected_warnings include 'category_inferred' and note in 'notes'.
raw_text_reference must be a verbatim substring from the page (post-OCR if scanned).
Phase 1 evaluation only requires: category, item_name, rate, currency, source-grounding, and warning flags. Variants/add-ons go into 'phase2_only_detail' and are scored under the Phase 2 Parking Set.
If the page is unreadable, mark the page-level field 'unreadable=true' and skip rows; this is a valid evaluation case.
Two reviewers fill the same template independently for Phase 1 Golden and Stress sets. A third resolves disagreements.
When 'frozen_at' is set, this file is immutable for the dataset_version. Any change requires a new dataset_version.
